check_fast_log.body:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:64:64-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-s0:64:64-f80:128:128-n8:16:32:64"
target triple = "x86_64-pc-linux-gnu"

define zeroext i1 @test_pr30244(i1 zeroext %flag, i1 zeroext %flag2, i32 %blksA, i32 %blksB, i32 %nblks) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test_pr30244(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P:%.*]] = alloca i8, align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN:%.*]], label [[IF_ELSE:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp uge i32 [[BLKSA:%.*]], [[NBLKS:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.else:
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG2:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN2:%.*]], label [[IF_END:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then2:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[NBLKS]], [[BLKSB:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = icmp ule i32 [[ADD]], [[BLKSA]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT]]
; CHECK:       if.end.sink.split:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2_SINK:%.*]] = phi i1 [ [[CMP2]], [[IF_THEN2]] ], [ [[CMP]], [[IF_THEN]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[FROMBOOL3:%.*]] = zext i1 [[CMP2_SINK]] to i8
; CHECK-NEXT:    store i8 [[FROMBOOL3]], ptr [[P]], align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END]]
; CHECK:       if.end:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 true
entry:
  %p = alloca i8, align 1
  br i1 %flag, label %if.then, label %if.else

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %blksA, %nblks
  %frombool1 = zext i1 %cmp to i8
  store i8 %frombool1, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.else:                                          ; preds = %entry
  br i1 %flag2, label %if.then2, label %if.end

if.then2:                                         ; preds = %if.else
  %add = add i32 %nblks, %blksB
  %cmp2 = icmp ule i32 %add, %blksA
  %frombool3 = zext i1 %cmp2 to i8
  store i8 %frombool3, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.end:                                           ; preds = %if.then2, %if.else, %if.then
  ret i1 true
}

; CHECK-NEXT:    store i8 [[FROMBOOL3]], ptr [[P]], align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END]]
; CHECK:       if.end:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 true
entry:
  %p = alloca i8, align 1
  br i1 %flag, label %if.then, label %if.else

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %blksA, %nblks
  %frombool1 = zext i1 %cmp to i8
  store i8 %frombool1, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

  %frombool3 = zext i1 %cmp2 to i8

  br label %if.end

if.end:                                           ; preds = %if.then2, %if.else, %if.then

define i1 @test_pr30244(i1 zeroext %flag, i1 zeroext %flag2, i32 %blksA, i32 %blksB, i32 %nblks) zeroext {
entry:
  %p = alloca i64 1, align 1
  br i1 zeroext %flag, label %if.then, label %if.else

if.else:
  br i1 zeroext %flag2, label %if.then2, label %if.end

if.then2:
  %add = add i32 %nblks, %blksB
  %cmp2 = icmp ule i32 %add, %blksA
  %frombool3 = zext i1 %cmp2 to i8
  store i8 %frombool3, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.then:
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %blksA, %nblks
  %frombool1 = zext i1 %cmp to i8
  store i8 %frombool1, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.end:
  ret i1 1
}

if.end:

}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:64:64-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-s0:64:64-f80:128:128-n8:16:32:64"
target triple = "x86_64-pc-linux-gnu"

define zeroext i1 @test_pr30244(i1 zeroext %flag, i1 zeroext %flag2, i32 %blksA, i32 %blksB, i32 %nblks) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test_pr30244(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P:%.*]] = alloca i8, align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN:%.*]], label [[IF_ELSE:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp uge i32 [[BLKSA:%.*]], [[NBLKS:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.else:
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG2:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN2:%.*]], label [[IF_END:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then2:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[NBLKS]], [[BLKSB:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = icmp ule i32 [[ADD]], [[BLKSA]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT]]
; CHECK:       if.end.sink.split:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2_SINK:%.*]] = phi i1 [ [[CMP2]], [[IF_THEN2]] ], [ [[CMP]], [[IF_THEN]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[FROMBOOL3:%.*]] = zext i1 [[CMP2_SINK]] to i8
; CHECK-NEXT:    store i8 [[FROMBOOL3]], ptr [[P]], align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END]]
; CHECK:       if.end:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 true
entry:
  %p = alloca i8, align 1
  br i1 %flag, label %if.then, label %if.else

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %blksA, %nblks
  %frombool1 = zext i1 %cmp to i8
  store i8 %frombool1, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.else:                                          ; preds = %entry
  br i1 %flag2, label %if.then2, label %if.end

if.then2:                                         ; preds = %if.else
  %add = add i32 %nblks, %blksB
  %cmp2 = icmp ule i32 %add, %blksA
  %frombool3 = zext i1 %cmp2 to i8
  store i8 %frombool3, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.end:                                           ; preds = %if.then2, %if.else, %if.then
  ret i1 true
}

!llvm.dbg.cu = !{!2}

!3 = !DIFile(filename: "a.c", directory: "a/b")

  %frombool3 = zext i1 %cmp2 to i8

  %frombool1 = zext i1 %cmp to i8
  store i8 %frombool1, ptr %p, align 1

}

check_fast_log.name: test_pr30244
check_fast_log.body:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64:64-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:64:64-f32:32:32-f64:64:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-s0:64:64-f80:128:128-n8:16:32:64"
target triple = "x86_64-pc-linux-gnu"

define zeroext i1 @test_pr30244(i1 zeroext %flag, i1 zeroext %flag2, i32 %blksA, i32 %blksB, i32 %nblks) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @test_pr30244(
; CHECK-NEXT:  entry:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[P:%.*]] = alloca i8, align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN:%.*]], label [[IF_ELSE:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP:%.*]] = icmp uge i32 [[BLKSA:%.*]], [[NBLKS:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.else:
; CHECK-NEXT:    br i1 [[FLAG2:%.*]], label [[IF_THEN2:%.*]], label [[IF_END:%.*]]
; CHECK:       if.then2:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[ADD:%.*]] = add i32 [[NBLKS]], [[BLKSB:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2:%.*]] = icmp ule i32 [[ADD]], [[BLKSA]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END_SINK_SPLIT]]
; CHECK:       if.end.sink.split:
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[CMP2_SINK:%.*]] = phi i1 [ [[CMP2]], [[IF_THEN2]] ], [ [[CMP]], [[IF_THEN]] ]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[FROMBOOL3:%.*]] = zext i1 [[CMP2_SINK]] to i8
; CHECK-NEXT:    store i8 [[FROMBOOL3]], ptr [[P]], align 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    br label [[IF_END]]
; CHECK:       if.end:
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 true
entry:
  %p = alloca i8, align 1
  br i1 %flag, label %if.then, label %if.else

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %blksA, %nblks
  %frombool1 = zext i1 %cmp to i8
  store i8 %frombool1, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.else:                                          ; preds = %entry
  br i1 %flag2, label %if.then2, label %if.end

if.then2:                                         ; preds = %if.else
  %add = add i32 %nblks, %blksB
  %cmp2 = icmp ule i32 %add, %blksA
  %frombool3 = zext i1 %cmp2 to i8
  store i8 %frombool3, ptr %p, align 1
  br label %if.end

if.end:                                           ; preds = %if.then2, %if.else, %if.then
  ret i1 true
}

!llvm.dbg.cu = !{!2}

  store i8 %frombool1, ptr %p, align 1
